Leaders Africains Contemporains.explanation: António Guterres, former Portuguese Prime Minister, has been UN Secretary-General since 2017.

Leaders Africains Contemporains.explanation: Nelson Mandela became South Africa's first black president in 1994, after 27 years in prison.

Organisations Africaines.question: When was the African Union (AU) created?
Organisations Africaines.explanation: The AU was created in 2002 to replace the Organization of African Unity (OAU, 1963).

Organisations Africaines.question: Where is the headquarters of the African Union located?
